use_cases: Landing page hero sections that need to capture immediate attention with interactive visual effects.
Feature announcement sections where the spotlight effect draws focus to key messaging.
Product or service showcases where the cursor-following glow creates an engaging user experience.
Conversion-focused sections that benefit from a visually dynamic call-to-action.
ai_summary: An interactive spotlight CTA component that features a cursor-following glow effect, creating an engaging visual experience that draws attention to call-to-action elements. The component tracks mouse and touch movements to position a radial spotlight, with animated arrow icons on hover. Designed for prominent placement on landing pages to maximize conversion through visually compelling interactions.
